picks.reasoning: Celta Vigo are coming off a massive 1-0 win at Atlético Madrid, which will have confidence sky-high. Borja Iglesias is in clinical form. Levante struggle away from home and Celta's momentum should carry them to a comfortable home win.

A play-off semi-final 2nd leg. The 1st leg was 0-0, meaning Southampton's home advantage is now the deciding factor. They dominated large parts of the away leg (Harwood-Bellis chance at 84') and should secure the win at St Mary's.

Betis were denied a win against Sociedad by a 90+1' penalty, but their performance was strong. Aitor Ruibal's suspension is a blow, but Elche are outclassed in this fixture. Betis will be eager to bounce back at home.
